implementation_summary: Configured the Unity 6000.3.19f1 project as a planar URP 2D baseline with linear color, the new Input System backend, zero 2D gravity, one Renderer2D-backed pipeline shared by all quality profiles, and owned URP global/volume settings.

files_changed.change: Pinned linear color and enabled the new Input System native backend.
Selected the owned URP 2D pipeline and URP global settings as project defaults.
Pinned six rendering-only quality profiles to the same URP 2D pipeline.
Pinned the owned 2D physics configuration with zero planar gravity.
Created the default URP Renderer2D data asset through Unity.
Created the project URP asset with Renderer2D at default renderer index zero.
Moved the generated URP global settings into the task-owned rendering directory.
Moved the generated empty default volume profile beside its owning URP settings.

verification.output: Unity exited 0 and reported UF003_SETUP_COMPLETE with Renderer2D, the URP 2D pipeline, and all 6 quality profiles. The temporary setup helper was removed afterward.
Fresh Unity 6000.3.19f1 verification import exited 0, registered all 21 locked packages, and reported no compiler, graphics-setting, shader, or batchmode error.

verification.command: PowerShell UF-003 serialized-reference and policy scan
verification.output: UF003_STATIC_OK pipeline=fbad363524ccb9a4db2ca0fb949c9846 renderer2d=eada7f6314848b04faa330d51b6bc632 quality_profiles=6 color_space=linear input=new physics2d_gravity=zero forbidden_3d_refs=0

verification.command: Manual empty-scene renderer and quality-profile inspection
verification.output: Nemo confirmed the unsaved empty scene uses ShooterMoverURP2D with ShooterMoverRenderer2D and accepted PR #19. The automated serialized scan separately confirmed all six quality profiles share that pipeline and contain no gameplay-authority fields.

proof.summary: Unity-authored Renderer2D data referenced by the pipeline asset.
Unity-authored URP asset with the 2D renderer at default index zero.
Exact-editor setup, clean re-import, GUID/reference validation, quality-policy scan, and forbidden 3D-physics scan passed.
Nemo confirmed the empty-scene URP 2D renderer and merged PR #19, accepting UF-003.

notes: Accepted through merged PR #19 after exact-editor, static quality-policy, and human empty-scene renderer checks passed. No scene, camera, gameplay, or 3D-physics asset is part of UF-003.
